title: RealClient
description: Explore a beautiful world in this Modpack!
body:
Modpack made based on **SimplyOptimized** with **MY fun** in mind, keeping a bit of Vanilla and a few extra things.
- This Modpack offers great open-world immersion and exploration with insane new Structures, **Naturalist** and **Wildlife** Animals, along with the **Distant Horizon**. Mob and Player animations include **Fresh Animations**, as well as ambient and general sounds using **Ambient Sounds** and **Physics Sounds** mods.
- With beauty in mind, there are mods that make details more beautiful. 
- Removed Herobrine

This Modpack is intended to be **Client-side** for use on Servers that will have the “**Real Server**” that will be published in the future.
